'''Bolton Kek''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] at [[Holowan Laboratories/Legends|Holowan Laboratories]] and one of the neural network designers of [[Project Phlutdroid/Legends|Project Phlutdroid]], which resulted in the production of [[IG-88B|IG-88]] and his counterparts. Kek retired from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service on "moral grounds" prior to the project's completion, and thus avoided being slaughtered by the assassin droids in the [[Holowan Massacre]]. He eventually settled on the obscure world of [[Peridon's Folly]]. [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B]] used [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] missions as cover for assassinating the surviving Holowan scientists who potentially knew dangerous details of the IG-series design. After completing an assignment from [[Grlubb]] on Peridon's Folly, IG-88 stealthily entered Kek's home at night and found him asleep with a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing girl. Ignoring the girl, the assassin droid fired a single shot into Kek's head, killing him instantly.

==Appearances==
